items.title: De-puffs instantly
items.text: Cold constricts and drains, so under-eye bags and morning swelling visibly deflate in minutes.

items.text: A cold dip tightens the look of pores for a smoother, blurred, camera-ready surface.

how.title: Your cold-glow routine in three steps

steps.title: Fill & chill
steps.text: Unfold the basin, add cold water and a tray of ice. The insulated silicone keeps it icy far longer than a bowl.

steps.title: Dip & breathe
steps.text: Lower your face, relax, and breathe calmly through the built-in tube. Start with a few seconds and build up.

steps.title: Rise & glow
steps.text: Pat dry and watch skin turn tight, bright and sculpted. Follow with serum while pores are primed to drink it in.

how.tube_text: The signature RX SUBZERO breathing tube lets you keep your face fully submerged while you breathe slowly and calmly — so you get the full cold benefit without coming up for air.
how.img_ph: Overhead: hands lowering a face into the RX SUBZERO basin

items.a: It's a bracing rush, not pain. Most users start with just a few seconds and build up as it quickly becomes the best part of their morning. Always ease in at your own pace.

items.q: How cold should the water be?
items.a: Cold tap water plus a handful of ice is plenty for that de-puffing, pore-tightening effect. There's no need to make it painfully icy — comfortable and consistent wins.

items.q: How long do I stay under?
items.a: Short is perfect. Many users dip for 10 to 30 seconds at a time, breathing calmly through the tube, then repeat a few rounds. Do what feels good and never force it.

items.q: How do I keep it clean?
items.a: Empty it after each use, rinse with warm water and a little mild soap, wipe down and let it air-dry. The smooth silicone won't trap residue, and it folds away spotless.
Yes — the whole basin collapses to a slim disc under two inches tall, so it tucks into a drawer or a carry-on and disappears until tomorrow's ritual.

items.q: Is it safe for my skin?
items.a: For most people a brief cold dip is a gentle, refreshing ritual. If you have rosacea, cold urticaria, cardiovascular concerns, or any skin condition, check with your doctor first. Skip it if cold makes you feel unwell, and never dip alone if you feel faint.
Orders ship free with express delivery and tracking. If it's not for you, you're covered by our 60-night guarantee — return it for a full refund, no drama.
